$schema: Fact Bank v2 — 200 facts (164 NL / 36 ID). Peer-reviewed design.
persona_note: v2 test persona (fictional). 80% natural language / 20% unique ID. All info is fictional.
design_principles: 5 distractor types: exact_substitute, partial_match, negative, conditional, hierarchical
Ecological validity: real memory log distribution

facts.statement: My older sister doesn't drink coffee

distractor.statement: My older sister also likes coffee
